title: DestinyBond Cobblemon
description: Official modpack for the DestinyBond Cobblemon server.
body:
This modpack is built around **Cobblemon**, a mod that brings the beloved world of Pokémon into Minecraft. It features additional quality-of-life mods and Cobblemon addons designed to enhance the overall gameplay experience. While it's built for use on our official **DestinyBond** server—it’s also fully playable in singleplayer if you prefer to explore on your own!

🌟 What we offer:

- 🏆 **Player-Run Gyms** – Compete against real players and fight to claim all eight badges!
- 📘 **TMs** - With an array of Technical Machines, create the ultimate team by teaching your Pokémon new moves.
- 💥 **Mega Evolutions** – Turn the tides of battles mid-fight with powerful new forms using the mechanics of Mega Evolution.
- 🛍️ **Player Shops** – Start your own shop to sell rare items and manage a business in the player-driven economy.
- 🌐 **Global Trade System** – Seamlessly trade Pokémon with other users anytime through a global marketplace.
- 📏 **Pokémon Size Variation** - Find Pokémon of all different sizes, making every encounter feel fresh and unique.
- and more!

Join our Discord: [https://discord.gg/GUteJnvEfu](https://discord.gg/GUteJnvEfu)

Server IP: play.destinybond.co
